title: Minimalism
description: Transparent graphical interface, hearts and inscriptions in the form of stripes, changed blocks and other textures.
body:
![Minimalism](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f135c5226956b8826cf50c29b5afbdc4dce31f0.png)
## Compatibility
Supported versions: **1.20.5 - 26.1.1**                
## Changes
**Edited Entities**:            
- Shulker Box           
- Iron Golem           

**Edited Blocks**:                                                                                  
- Shulker Box                                                                                    
- Bedrock                   
- Ancient Debris              
- Suspicious Gravel            
- Suspicious Sand             
- Destroy Animation               
- Budding Amethyst            
   
**Edited Items**:            
- End Crystal             
- XP Bottle           
- Nether Star            
- Knowledge                             
- Tadpole Bucket                

**Edited GUI**:          
- Widgets
- World List
- Recipe Book
- Server List
- Social Interactions
- Spectator
- Statistics
- Advancements
- Icons
- Popup
- Enchanted Table
- Anvil
- Beacon
- Furnace
- Grindstone
- Horse
- Loom
- Smithing
- Smoker
- Stonecutter
- Villager
- Blast Furnace
- Brewing Stand
- Bundle
- Cartography Table
- Crafter
- Creative Inventory
- Slot
- Hud
- Boss Bar
- Chest
- Inventory
- Recipe Book
